title: Audit current template baseline
description: Read package.json, pnpm-lock.yaml, next.config, eslint config, tsconfig, and README. Do not change code. Output current Node, pnpm, Next.js, ESLint, lint/build status. Acceptance: baseline notes are written in docs/upgrade-node24-baseline.md.

comments.author: longcrawfish
comments.text: Validation: corepack pnpm install passed with Node 24 engine warning and pnpm 10 build-script approval warning. corepack pnpm lint failed because package script uses next lint, which Next 16 treats as invalid project directory. corepack pnpm build passed after rerun outside sandbox port restrictions. Baseline notes written to docs/upgrade-node24-baseline.md.
